features.label: Regex Visualizer
features.desc: Token-by-token visual flow diagram. Each part of the pattern shown as a colored node.

features.label: Match Navigator
features.desc: Prev/Next buttons to jump between matches one by one. Current match highlighted in gold.

features.label: Performance Benchmark
features.desc: Run regex N times (1K–1M iterations), measure total time, per-op µs, ops/sec. Detects catastrophic backtracking.

features.label: Pattern History
features.desc: Last 20 typed patterns auto-saved per session.

features.label: Share Pattern
features.desc: Encode pattern + flags + test string into a shareable link. Import from link.

features.label: Import/Export Saved Patterns
features.desc: Export all saved patterns as JSON file. Import from JSON to merge.
features.howto: Regex Tester → Saved tab → Export / Import

features.label: Escape Helper
features.desc: Paste any raw string → auto-escapes all regex special chars.

features.label: Quantifier Helper + Unicode Properties
features.desc: Visual quantifier cards + custom {n,m} builder. Unicode tab with \p{...} property buttons.
features.howto: Regex Tester → Quant tab · Unicode tab
